repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: population SDiD/ASCM/MC/staggered comparison objects and influence-row equality frontier

published_prior_art.cite: ArkhangelskyImbens2022 gives panel double-robust identification; AbadieAgarwalDwivediShah2024 gives doubly robust inference in causal latent-factor models

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: spectral equality frontier for SDiD/ASCM/MC/staggered functionals and influence rows

published_prior_art.cite: RothSantAnna2021 gives staggered rollout efficiency; ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021 gives SDiD asymptotics; AbadieAgarwalDwivediShah2024 gives low-rank double-robust inference

repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1: observable spectral threshold for equality/separation of SDiD and matrix-completion objects

published_prior_art.cite: CandesTao2010 and KeshavanMontanariOhFew2010 are random-mask matrix-completion thresholds; YanWainwright2024 is staggered-panel entrywise inference, not this deterministic OLB margin

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The closest low-rank double-robust comparator AbadieAgarwalDwivediShah2024, 'Doubly Robust Inference in Causal Latent Factor Models', is missing; it directly combines outcome imputation, inverse probability weighting, cross-fit matrix completion, and parametric-rate inference.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The generic open-class lower-bound claim for Gamma_OLB <= 0 has no concrete non-corner instance computing Gamma_OLB and the stated target-cell bias; the three-cohort example only sketches Delta_OLB separation.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The oracle score adds the weighted untreated residual, but Assumption balance equates target nuisance error to weighted untreated nuisance error; expectation becomes target error plus weighted error, not zero, so the displayed double-robust algebra fails unless the sign or assumption is changed.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Delta_OLB is defined using B_lr(w;A,B) for an arbitrary factorization M0=AB^T; without an SVD/normalization or invariant tangent-space norm, Delta_OLB is not pinned as a function of P.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Gamma_OLB uses singular values of M_hat over the staggered untreated mask O0 and undefined leverage/overlap constants rho(D,r), kappa(D,r); the proposal does not specify the rectangular completion/fill convention needed for the singular values.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the plus sign on the weighted untreated residual with the cancelling sign, or rewrite Assumption balance so the displayed score's expectation actually cancels; then redo the homogeneous DID sanity reduction.
Define Delta_OLB with an invariant tangent-space projection norm, e.g. after fixing an SVD gauge for M0 or by writing B_lr directly as a linear functional on the rank-r tangent space.
Add Abadie-Agarwal-Dwivedi-Shah 2024 as a direct comparator and state exactly why OLB differs: staggered event-time ATT, balancing route, deterministic mask margin, or intersection EIF.
Turn the three-cohort example into a numeric witness for Conjecture 2 by computing Gamma_OLB, B_lr, and the nonzero target-cell bias under bounded weights.

recommended_next_step: Reject this v2 kernel as stated; repair the score algebra and invariant Delta/Gamma definitions before another novelty review.
